bouncy_jump.description: Bouncy, energetic entrance for playful elements

cinematic_slow.description: Slow, dramatic reveal for cinematic moments

elastic_pop.description: Quick elastic pop-in for UI elements

gentle_float.description: Gentle floating motion for ambient elements

snap.description: Fast snap into position, minimal overshoot

animation_techniques.name: pop_in
animation_techniques.description: Element scales from 3x to 1x with spring, creating a dramatic entrance
animation_techniques.code_pattern: const scale = spring({ frame: frame - startFrame, fps, config: { damping: 14 } }); transform: `scale(${interpolate(scale, [0, 1], [3, 1])})`

animation_techniques.name: typewriter
animation_techniques.description: Text appears character by character at a consistent rate
animation_techniques.code_pattern: const charsShown = Math.floor(frame * charsPerFrame); const displayText = fullText.slice(0, charsShown);

animation_techniques.name: staggered_reveal
animation_techniques.description: Multiple items animate in sequence with overlapping delays
animation_techniques.code_pattern: items.map((item, i) => { const delay = i * staggerFrames; const progress = spring({ frame: frame - delay, fps, config: { damping: 100 } }); ... })

animation_techniques.name: evolve_path
animation_techniques.description: SVG path draws progressively from start to end
animation_techniques.code_pattern: import { evolvePath } from '@remotion/paths'; const progress = interpolate(frame, [0, 60], [0, 1], { extrapolateRight: 'clamp' }); const evolved = evolvePath(progress, svgPathD);

animation_techniques.name: parallax_depth
animation_techniques.description: Multiple layers move at different speeds for depth perception
animation_techniques.code_pattern: const bgOffset = interpolate(frame, [0, total], [0, -50]); const fgOffset = interpolate(frame, [0, total], [0, -150]);

animation_techniques.name: glassmorphism
animation_techniques.description: Frosted glass effect with backdrop blur and semi-transparency
animation_techniques.code_pattern: background: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.1)', backdropFilter: 'blur(20px)', border: '1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.18)', borderRadius: 16

animation_techniques.name: aurora_gradient
animation_techniques.description: Animated gradient background that shifts hue over time
animation_techniques.code_pattern: const hue = interpolate(frame, [0, total], [200, 280]); background: `linear-gradient(135deg, hsl(${hue}, 70%, 15%), hsl(${hue + 60}, 60%, 10%))`

animation_techniques.name: iris_wipe
animation_techniques.description: Circular reveal that expands from center to edges
animation_techniques.code_pattern: const radius = interpolate(frame, [0, 30], [0, 150], { extrapolateRight: 'clamp' }); clipPath: `circle(${radius}% at 50% 50%)`

animation_techniques.name: ghost_trail
animation_techniques.description: Fading copies trail behind a moving element
animation_techniques.code_pattern: Array.from({length: 5}, (_, i) => { const trailFrame = frame - i * 3; const opacity = 1 - i * 0.2; ... })

animation_techniques.name: count_up
animation_techniques.description: Number animates from 0 to target value over time
animation_techniques.code_pattern: const progress = interpolate(frame, [startFrame, startFrame + 60], [0, 1], { extrapolateLeft: 'clamp', extrapolateRight: 'clamp' }); const value = Math.round(progress * target);

animation_techniques.name: bar_growth
animation_techniques.description: Horizontal or vertical bars grow from 0 to final width/height
animation_techniques.code_pattern: const barProgress = spring({ frame: frame - delay, fps, config: { damping: 100 } }); width: `${barProgress * maxWidth}%`

animation_techniques.name: floating_particles
animation_techniques.description: Ambient particles driven by noise for organic motion
animation_techniques.code_pattern: import { noise3D } from '@remotion/noise'; const x = noise3D('x', i * 0.1, frame * 0.01, 0) * 200; const y = noise3D('y', i * 0.1, frame * 0.01, 0) * 200;

animation_techniques.name: blur_to_sharp
animation_techniques.description: Element starts blurred and resolves to sharp focus
animation_techniques.code_pattern: const blur = interpolate(frame, [start, start + 20], [15, 0], { extrapolateRight: 'clamp' }); filter: `blur(${blur}px)`

animation_techniques.name: slide_in_from_edge
animation_techniques.description: Element slides in from off-screen with spring physics
animation_techniques.code_pattern: const enter = spring({ frame, fps, config: { damping: 200 }, durationInFrames: 15 }); transform: `translateX(${interpolate(enter, [0, 1], [-1920, 0])}px)`

animation_techniques.name: kinetic_typography
animation_techniques.description: Words fly in from different directions with varying speeds
animation_techniques.code_pattern: words.map((word, i) => { const angle = (i / words.length) * Math.PI * 2; const x = Math.cos(angle) * 1000; const y = Math.sin(angle) * 1000; const p = spring({frame: frame - i*5, fps}); transform: `translate(${x*(1-p)}px, ${y*(1-p)}px)` })

animation_techniques.name: 3d_rotation
animation_techniques.description: Element rotates in 3D space with perspective

animation_techniques.name: energy_flow_particles
animation_techniques.description: Particles flow along a path to represent energy transfer
animation_techniques.code_pattern: particles.map((p, i) => { const t = ((frame * 0.02 + i / count) % 1); const x = interpolate(t, [0,1], [startX, endX]); const y = interpolate(t, [0,1], [startY, endY]); })

animation_techniques.name: pixel_block_building
animation_techniques.description: Text or image built pixel-by-pixel like cursor editing
animation_techniques.code_pattern: const revealed = Math.floor(interpolate(frame, [0, 60], [0, totalBlocks], { extrapolateRight: 'clamp' })); blocks.slice(0, revealed).map(block => ...)

product_demo.description: 8-scene product walkthrough from Launch Video pattern

data_story.description: Data-driven narrative from Rocket Launches / Bar-Line patterns

cinematic_intro.description: Dramatic opener from Cinematic Tech Intro pattern

technical_explainer.description: Engineering/scientific animation from BMS Cell Balancing pattern

travel_map.description: Geographic journey from Travel Route pattern

social_media_promo.description: Fast-paced promotional from CD Store / VVTerm patterns

cyberpunk.feel: Neon cyberpunk for dramatic tech intros

glassmorphism_dark.feel: Frosted glass dark for modern SaaS/product demos

prompt_writing_patterns.specify_timing: Always specify frame ranges: 'Title fades in from frame 10 to 30, subtitle appears at frame 40'
prompt_writing_patterns.describe_visual_feel: Use sensory language: 'glassmorphism panels floating in dark void', 'warm golden light cascading across text'
prompt_writing_patterns.request_spring_configs: Name the feel: 'bouncy pop-in', 'smooth professional slide', 'cinematic slow reveal'
prompt_writing_patterns.describe_color: Reference palette mood: 'dark tech palette with blue accents', 'cyberpunk neon on black'
prompt_writing_patterns.structure_scenes: Specify act and purpose: 'Act 1 hook: surprising statistic with count-up animation and particle burst'
prompt_writing_patterns.data_specificity: Include actual numbers: 'bar chart showing: React 67%, Vue 24%, Angular 9%' not just 'show framework popularity'
